parents.subject: LU-502 don't allow to kill service threads by OOM killer.

commit.subject: ORNL-8: Imperative Recovery
commit.message:
ORNL-8: Imperative Recovery

Initial implementation.

* Standard IR
* Non IR client support

Change-Id: I058404969c728f228abee3a918d78789099b2aa6
Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jay@whamcloud.com>
